query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `epi_estoque_obra` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `companyId` int NOT NULL,
  `epiId` int NOT NULL,
  `obraId` int NOT NULL,
  `quantidade` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  INDEX `idx_eeo_company` (`companyId`),
  INDEX `idx_eeo_epi` (`epiId`),
  INDEX `idx_eeo_obra` (`obraId`),
  INDEX `idx_eeo_epi_obra` (`epiId`, `obraId`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `epi_transferencias` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `companyId` int NOT NULL,
  `epiId` int NOT NULL,
  `quantidade` int NOT NULL,
  `tipo_origem` enum('central','obra') NOT NULL,
  `origem_obra_id` int,
  `destino_obra_id` int NOT NULL,
  `data` date NOT NULL,
  `observacoes` text,
  `criado_por` varchar(255),
  `criado_por_user_id` int,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  INDEX `idx_et_company` (`companyId`),
  INDEX `idx_et_epi` (`epiId`),
  INDEX `idx_et_destino` (`destino_obra_id`),
  INDEX `idx_et_data` (`companyId`, `data`)
);

ALTER TABLE `epi_deliveries` ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `origem_entrega` enum('central','obra') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'central';
ALTER TABLE `epi_deliveries` ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `obra_id` int;
